zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡，空头略占优势
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD报68.65美元，价格运行于20日均线71.11美元下方，显示短期趋势仍偏空。24小时跌幅虽仅0.46%，但反弹力度有限，说明市场买盘较为谨慎。若后续无法快速收复70美元关口，弱势整理格局可能进一步延续。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为-0.8593，处于零轴下方，反映空头动能仍然存在。虽然未提供完整信号线与RSI数据，但结合价格持续位于均线下方判断，市场情绪偏向防御。当前走势更接近下跌后的整理阶段，而非明确反转结构。

支撑方面，68.50美元附近是短线重要防守区域，也是本轮日内低点所在。若跌破该位置，价格可能进一步测试67.00美元至66.50美元区域。上方首个阻力位位于70.00美元整数关口，进一步阻力则集中在20日均线对应的71.10美元附近。

交易策略上，激进交易者可关注68.50美元支撑附近的企稳信号，尝试轻仓布局反弹机会；稳健投资者则建议等待价格重新站上70美元并突破71.10美元后再考虑顺势跟进。在MACD尚未明显改善前，应控制仓位并严格设置止损，以防市场出现进一步回调风险。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
SOL/USD is currently trading at 68.65, posting a modest 24-hour decline of 0.46% while remaining near the session low of 68.51. Price action continues to reflect a short-term bearish structure, with the market struggling to regain momentum after slipping below the 20-day simple moving average at 71.11. The inability to reclaim this moving average suggests sellers remain in control, and broader sentiment is cautious despite the relatively limited daily volatility.

Technical indicators reinforce the prevailing weakness. The MACD reading of -0.859 indicates negative momentum remains present, signaling that bearish pressure has not yet fully dissipated. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD value itself suggests downside momentum continues to outweigh buying interest. The absence of RSI data limits overbought or oversold assessment, but the current price position beneath the SMA(20) provides a clear indication that trend strength remains tilted toward the downside in the near term.

From a key levels perspective, immediate support is located around the intraday low near 68.50. A decisive break below this area could expose additional downside toward the psychological 67.00 region, where buyers may attempt to stabilize the market. On the upside, initial resistance appears around 69.05, followed by stronger resistance near the 20-day moving average at 71.11. A successful move above the SMA would be an important signal that bullish momentum is beginning to recover.

For traders, patience may be warranted until clearer directional confirmation emerges. Conservative participants may prefer to wait for a sustained break above 71.11 before considering bullish positions. Meanwhile, short-term traders could monitor reactions around the 68.50 support zone, as a breakdown would favor continued downside momentum. Risk management remains essential, with stop-loss placement and position sizing carefully adjusted to account for ongoing market uncertainty and bearish technical conditions.
